title: RESTORE - 211info
text: HABITAT FOR HUMANITY RESTORE RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donated furniture and building materials and re-sells them to the public at discounted prices. May be able to pick up materials. Proceeds support Habitat for Humanity of the Mid-Willamette Valley. 1249 13th Street SE Salem, OR 97302 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: Monday-Saturday 9am-6pm Donation Drop-off: Monday-Saturday 10am-4pm Email (503) 485-4845 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 485-4845 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in to store. Call to schedule a pickup or drop-off of donations. Pickups must be scheduled in advance and are only available on certain weekdays. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Cities of Aumsville, Detroit, Gates, Keizer, Lyons, Mill City, Salem, Stayton, and Sublimity and Polk County Services: Donation Drop Off Points Donation Pickups Low Cost Building Materials/Supplies Thrift Shops If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
